testimonials.name: Subasis Das
testimonials.quote: I had a very insightful consultation with Piyus regarding my son’s career. It truly opened my eyes to the depth of career counselling. I’m highly satisfied with his patience, approach, and the structured method used to identify and develop skills

testimonials.name: Sai Sikha Singh
testimonials.quote: I’m truly grateful for Piyus Sir’s guidance at New Step Career Counselling. His personalized approach helped me discover my strengths and choose the right path. Highly recommend to anyone seeking clarity.

testimonials.name: Sujit
testimonials.quote: I’m truly grateful for Piyus Sir’s guidance at New Step Career Counselling. His personalized approach helped me gain clarity on my strengths and make informed career decisions. I highly recommend his services to anyone seeking direction.
